basic_details.job_title: SGPGIMS Group B, C, D Exam Date 2026 (Out) - Check Schedule & Details
basic_details.short_information: SGPGIMS Group B, C, D Exam Date 2026: The Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS), Lucknow has officially released the exam date for the Group B, C & D posts recruitment. Candidates who have applied for various Group B, C, and D posts can check the complete exam schedule below. The Computer Based Test (CBT) is scheduled to be held from 19 June 2026 to 23 June 2026. All eligible candidates are advised to download their admit cards and prepare accordingly.

faq.question: Q1. When is the SGPGIMS Group B, C, D exam scheduled for 2026?
faq.answer: The Computer Based Test is scheduled from 19 June 2026 to 23 June 2026. Candidates can check the official notification for complete details.

faq.question: Q2. Where can I download the SGPGIMS exam date notification?
faq.answer: You can download the notification from the official website https://sgpgims.org.in/ or use our direct link provided above.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any change in the SGPGIMS Group B, C, D exam date 2026?
faq.answer: As per the latest notification, the exam is scheduled between 19-23 June 2026. Any changes will be updated on the official website.

faq.question: Q4. When will the SGPGIMS admit card be released?
faq.answer: The admit card will be released 48 hours before the examination date. Keep checking the official website regularly.

faq.question: Q5. What is the exam mode for SGPGIMS Group B, C, D 2026?
faq.answer: The examination will be conducted in Online (CBT) mode.
